title: AI Model Comparison Playground

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI Model Comparison Playground

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><g transform='translate(10,10)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='380' height='280' fill='#f7f7f7'/><g><rect x='10' y='20' width='360' height='40' fill='#C06C88'><text x='20' y='40' font-size='24' fill='#fff'>AI Model Comparison Playground</text></rect><rect x='10' y='70' width='360' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='10' y='110' width='180' height='20' fill='#411C56'><text x='190' y='120' font-size='18' fill='#fff'>Models:</text></rect><g transform='translate(210,110)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='180' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'><text x='10' y='20' font-size='18' fill='#000'>Select Models</text></rect></g><rect x='10' y='140' width='360' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/><g transform='translate(10,160)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='360' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'><text x='20' y='20' font-size='18' fill='#000'>Filter by:</text></rect><rect x='20' y='20' width='80' height='20' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='110' y='30' font-size='18' fill='#000'>Task Type</text><g transform='translate(150,20)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='120' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='10' y='20' font-size='18' fill='#000'>Input Type</text></g><g transform='translate(170,20)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='100' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='10' y='20' font-size='18' fill='#000'>Output Type</text></g></g><rect x='10' y='190' width='380' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='10' y='220' width='360' height='80' fill='#f7f7f7' opacity='0.5'/><g transform='translate(210,230)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='180' height='80' fill='#411C56'><text x='10' y='240' font-size='18' fill='#fff'>Comparison Table</text></rect></g></g></g><rect x='10' y='290' width='380' height='10' fill='#C06C88'/></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: The comparison table should display the selected models and their characteristics.
The user should be able to select multiple models by checking the checkboxes in the models list.
The filter menu should allow the user to filter models by task type, input type, and output type.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI Model Comparison Playground

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify that the user can select multiple models, filter models, and view the comparison table.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
